product_description: Book Creator is a digital tool that enables students and teachers to create and read multimodal digital books, with a strong focus on inclusive learning environments and accessibility features.

vendor_resources.text: Keyboard Navigation in Book Creator (Book Creator Help Center)
vendor_resources.justification: Official help article specifically detailing keyboard navigation functionality and shortcuts.

vendor_resources.text: Accessibility Features in Book Creator (Book Creator YouTube)
vendor_resources.justification: Official YouTube video from Book Creator explaining various accessibility features including screen reader support and keyboard navigation.
